message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram: Internal state synchronization

box "Internal Service" #LightGray
participant Sender
participant IoTClient
participant ShadowCallback
end box

box "AWS Cloud" #LightGreen
participant ShadowService
end box

== client connection ==

Sender -> IoTClient : connect()
IoTClient -> ShadowCallback : on_conncet_wrapper()
ShadowCallback -> Sender : subscribe("AWS Shadow Topics")
Sender -> ShadowService : subscribe()
IoTClient -> ShadowCallback : on_subscribe_wrapper()
ShadowCallback -> ShadowCallback : request_desired_state()

== state retrival ==

ShadowCallback -> ShadowService : publish("myClient/shadow/get")
activate ShadowCallback #Salmon
activate IoTClient #Salmon
deactivate IoTClient
ShadowService -> ShadowCallback : on_message("myClient/shadow/get/accepted", state)
deactivate ShadowCallback
IoTClient -> ShadowCallback : on_message_wrapper(rawState)
ShadowCallback -> ShadowCallback : on_desired_state_change(rawState)

== state synchronization ==

Sender <- ShadowCallback : set_state(desiredState)
Sender -> ShadowCallback : on_set_state_wrapper()
ShadowCallback -> ShadowCallback : publish_new_state()
ShadowCallback -> ShadowService : publish("myClient/shadow/update", reportedState)
activate IoTClient #Salmon
activate ShadowCallback #Salmon
deactivate ShadowCallback
ShadowCallback -> ShadowService : publish("myClient/shadow/update", state)
deactivate IoTClient

@enduml
```
